//: Config for editorconfig-checker. `.editorconfig` is the source of truth; this file only narrows what ec enforces to the axes no other tool already owns. Overlapping checks are delegated: trailing whitespace + final newline to the prek builtins, line endings to .gitattributes/ruff, and *.py line length to ruff. That leaves ec responsible for indent style/size and charset on the file types (JSON, JS, CSS, HTML, shell, Makefile) nothing else checks.
//Exclude: reStructuredText (Sphinx docs), Markdown, and Python are excluded from the indentation check because their indentation is semantic, not a fixed multiple: rst directive bodies align under `.. ` (3 cols); markdown ordered-list continuations align under `N. `; Python docstring prose (e.g. bulleted-list continuations) aligns under its marker. ruff is the single authority for Python formatting, and Sphinx/markdownlint-cli2 for the docs — so ec only owns indent style/size and charset on the config/markup file types (JSON(C), CFF, JS, CSS, HTML, shell, Makefile) that no other tool checks.
